creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:

Log:
  Update to 0.1.5

  Remove all patches: it's simpler to cope with the wrong library name in
  dependent ports while this change has not been merged upstream.

  Submitted by:	romain [1], sunpoet [2]
  With hat:	puppet
